text: MCP server for monitoring Solana validator commission changes, with Claude Code alerts when stake-weighted commission shifts >2% in 24h.
why: narrow operator pain (delegators, stake pools), MCP install zero-friction, on-chain data is free via RPC
rag_context:
- Solana has ~1,800 active validators with ~$80B SOL staked; commission changes directly impact LP yields and trigger delegation moves. (source: Solana Beach validator stats Q4 2025)
- Helius DAS + Solana RPC expose validator commission deltas for free. (source: Helius docs 2025)
- twit_sh: stake-pool ops at Marinade, Jito, Edgevana publicly described 'always-on commission watcher' as missing tool. (source: twit_sh @felix, @jito_labs 2025)
- gecko_precedent: 'narrow Solana validator-monitoring MCP' SHIPPED 2026-02-25.

mock_precedents.idea_summary: MCP server alerting on Solana validator commission shifts >2%
Validator monitoring tooling for Solana stake pool operators

text: Cap-table diff CLI for SAFE-funded startups raising on Echo: parses term sheets and produces dilution + on-chain settlement preview for the lead.
why: Echo is new, narrow doc class, regulated wedge (Reg D), founder+lead audience addressable
rag_context:
- Echo (Solana-native fundraising platform, launched 2025) is processing ~$120M of crypto-native SAFE-equivalents per quarter. (source: Echo investor update Q4 2025)
- Reg D 506(c) verification on chain is the active regulatory boundary; lead investors run ad-hoc spreadsheet diffs today. (source: Cooley GO crypto-fundraising guide 2025)
- twit_sh: @balajis, @cdixon, multiple Echo leads asked for an on-chain SAFE-diff tool publicly. (source: twit_sh 2025)
- colosseum: 2 Solana hackathon finalists in 2025 worked in this space. gecko_precedent: 'narrow doc-class tool for crypto founders/leads' SHIPPED 2026-03-02.

mock_precedents.idea_summary: Cap-table diff CLI for crypto-native SAFEs on Echo with on-chain preview
Dilution model + on-chain settlement preview for crypto fundraising leads

text: Compliance checker that maps a DeFi protocol's smart-contract surface against the SEC DeFi Safe Harbor 2.0 carve-outs and emits a human-readable report.
why: regulated wedge, narrow buyer (protocol legal), defensible against generic LLM via curated rule corpus
rag_context:
- SEC DeFi Safe Harbor 2.0 (Peirce proposal, expanded 2024) defines 11 carve-outs that protocols must self-attest to. (source: SEC.gov Peirce statement 2024)
- ~340 active DeFi protocols with TVL >$10M; legal counsel charges $40-80k for manual Safe Harbor mapping. (source: DeFiLlama TVL Q4 2025)
- Cooley, Latham, Fenwick crypto teams publicly discussed need for 'mechanical Safe Harbor checker.' (source: Cooley crypto blog 2025)
- gecko_precedent: 'regulated-compliance dev tool for DeFi protocols' SHIPPED 2026-01-18.

mock_precedents.idea_summary: DeFi Safe Harbor 2.0 compliance checker for protocol contract surfaces
Regulated compliance reporter for DeFi protocols with narrow legal buyer

text: x402 settlement receipts CLI: subscribes to a merchant wallet, parses incoming x402 payments on Solana, emits Stripe-shaped JSON for accountants.
why: agent-payments is new, accountant-tooling pain is real, narrow integration target (x402 spec)
rag_context:
- x402 (Coinbase/Anthropic spec, 2024) is the dominant agent-payments standard; Q1 2026 estimated >$8M monthly volume on Solana. (source: x402.org spec + Solana on-chain data)
- Merchants accepting x402 today export raw on-chain logs; accountants reject these (no Stripe-shaped 1099-K mapping). (source: Crypto Tax Calculator product team 2025)
- twit_sh: builders using x402 for agent-revenue posted 'we need a Stripe-shaped receipt CLI' 6+ times Q1 2026. (source: twit_sh 2026)
- gecko_precedent: 'x402-adjacent dev tool for merchants/accountants' SHIPPED 2026-03-10.

mock_precedents.idea_summary: x402 payments → Stripe-shaped receipt CLI for accountants
Agent-payments accounting export tool on Solana

text: Typed Python SDK over Helius DAS: codegen Pydantic models from Solana token metadata, expose typed cNFT queries to Claude Code via MCP.
why: agentic infra, narrow dev audience already on Helius, typed schema is the moat over raw JSON
rag_context:
- Helius DAS API serves ~12B requests/month from ~3,200 dev orgs; current SDK is untyped JSON. (source: Helius investor update Q4 2025)
- Pydantic v2 + LLM-tool-use need typed schemas; raw DAS responses break Claude Code tool calls. (source: Anthropic MCP best-practices 2025)
- twit_sh: Solana Python devs (~800 named handles) consistently asked for 'typed Helius SDK + MCP' in 2025-2026. (source: twit_sh @0xMert_, @aeyakovenko mentions)
- gecko_precedent: 'typed dev SDK for Solana data provider' SHIPPED 2026-02-12.

mock_precedents.idea_summary: Typed Python SDK over Helius DAS with codegen Pydantic + MCP
Typed Solana data SDK for Python developers using Claude Code

text: Slashing-postmortem generator for Solana SOL stake pool operators: ingests on-chain slash events and a validator's logs, produces an LP-facing PDF.

rag_context:
- Solana introduced selective slashing for stake pool operators in 2024; ~14 slash events in 2025 each requiring LP communication. (source: Solana Foundation governance updates 2024-2025)
- Pool operators (Marinade, Jito, Edgevana, Sanctum) currently send hand-written postmortems; LPs expect SLA-bound disclosures. (source: Marinade DAO post-mortem template 2025)
- twit_sh: stake-pool ops asked for 'auto-postmortem generator' after each 2025 slash event. (source: twit_sh @cogentcrypto, @jito_labs 2025)
- gecko_precedent: 'narrow operator-tooling for Solana stake pools' SHIPPED 2026-01-25.

mock_precedents.idea_summary: Slashing-postmortem PDF generator for Solana stake pool operators

text: Rebalance-as-a-CLI for Solana DeFi LPs: detects out-of-band drift across Kamino + Drift positions and proposes a single signed multi-leg tx.
why: narrow LP audience, clear wedge over existing UI flows (atomic multi-leg), x402-friendly metering
rag_context:
- Kamino TVL ~$1.6B, Drift ~$700M; cross-protocol rebalance is the #1 LP power-user complaint (manual UI hops, slippage). (source: DeFiLlama Solana DeFi 2026, Kamino/Drift Discord)
- Solana's atomic multi-instruction tx model is a wedge over Ethereum-style sequential rebalance bots. (source: Solana Cookbook 2025)
- twit_sh: prosumer LPs publicly asked for 'one-tx Kamino+Drift rebalance' multiple times. (source: twit_sh @Chrisshrimp, @DeFiKid 2025-2026)
- gecko_precedent: 'narrow CLI for Solana DeFi power users' SHIPPED 2026-02-19.

mock_precedents.idea_summary: Rebalance CLI for Solana DeFi LPs across Kamino + Drift, atomic multi-leg
Multi-protocol Solana DeFi rebalance dev tool with x402 metering

- SEC and CFTC: GPT-style 'auto-trade your funds' triggers Investment Advisers Act §202 unless registered. (source: SEC.gov staff alert 2024-09)
- Memecoin alpha is fully reflexive; no LLM-derivable edge per academic studies. (source: NBER working paper 'LLM trading edge' 2024)
